lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Sergeant
lines.text: We're here to keep the farmers safe from the lizardmen.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's not many of you though.

lines.speaker: Sergeant
lines.text: Luckily the lizardmen have been focusing their efforts elsewhere. They haven't tried to come up here yet.

lines.speaker: Sergeant
lines.text: If they do, we can quickly call in reinforcements if required.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Well I'd better let you get on then.
